User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the LearnAI Academy platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

points.description: The total points earned by the user.

level.description: The current level of the user.

phone.description: The user's phone number for SMS notifications.

CurriculumContent.title: Curriculum Content
CurriculumContent.description: Represents a piece of curriculum content for the RAG system.

grade.description: The grade level for the content (1-8).

topic.description: The specific topic within the chapter.

content.description: The actual lesson text in English.

urduContent.description: The Urdu translation of the content.

examples.description: An array of examples related to the content.

keywords.description: An array of keywords for the content.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the content was created.

DailyChallenge.title: Daily Challenge
DailyChallenge.description: Represents a single daily challenge for a user.

challengeId.description: Unique identifier for the type of challenge.

description.description: A brief description of what the user needs to do.

progress.description: The user's current progress towards the goal.

goal.description: The target value for the challenge to be completed.

completed.description: Whether the challenge has been completed.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the challenge expires.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Includes denormalized 'userId' in each document to enforce ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, corresponding to their Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores chunked and embedded curriculum content for the RAG system.

params.name: contentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the content chunk.

definition.description: Stores daily challenges for a user.

params.name: challengeId
params.description: The unique ID for the daily challenge instance.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability, aligning with the specified principles. Authorization independence is achieved by avoiding hierarchical dependencies and storing all necessary authorization data directly within each document. This approach supports atomic operations (transactions/batches) and simplifies debugging. The structure also supports the required QAPs (Rules are not Filters) by utilizing structural segregation.  Private user data is stored under the `/users/{userId}` path to enable secure list operations via path-based rules. Collaborative data would be stored in separate collections. This organization ensures that rules can be applied efficiently without needing to filter data based on content.
